message:
chore: Exclude web package from root ESLint configuration

Update the root ESLint configuration to ignore the packages/web directory,
as it has its own lint setup through Vite's ESLint integration.

Change:
Added 'packages/web/**' to the ignores array

Rationale:
- Web package uses different React-specific ESLint rules
- Prevents duplicate linting during root-level npm run lint
- Web package handles its own linting via package.json lint script
- Avoids rule conflicts between TUI (Node/Ink) and web (React DOM)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
